agentic-chat.notes: No dedicated agentic-chat page under llamaindex; quickstart covers the CopilotChat-driven baseline.

shared-state-streaming.notes: og_docs resolves; shell route 404s even though the mdx file exists at docs/content/docs/integrations/llamaindex/shared-state/predictive-state-updates.mdx — appears to be a shell routing/bundling gap for nested shared-state pages.

subagents.notes: No llamaindex-specific subagents/multi-agent-flows page (docs.copilotkit.ai/llamaindex/multi-agent-flows falls back to Introduction). Root /multi-agent-flows and /subagents also 404.

missing.reason: No dedicated llamaindex page for subagents / multi-agent-flows. The llamaindex docs tree has no multi-agent-flows.mdx, and docs.copilotkit.ai/llamaindex/multi-agent-flows resolves to the framework Introduction page (not a real subagents doc). Root-level /multi-agent-flows and /subagents return 404 on docs.copilotkit.ai.

Partial: og_docs_url (docs.copilotkit.ai/llamaindex/shared-state/predictive-state-updates) resolves, but the equivalent shell route /llamaindex/shared-state/predictive-state-updates returns 404. The source mdx exists in both docs/content and showcase/shell/src/content trees, so this looks like a shell routing bug affecting nested shared-state pages (in-app-agent-read, in-app-agent-write, workflow-execution, state-inputs-outputs all 404 on the shell as well).
